issues.title: Enemy dealt 16 damage (67% of 24 HP) on floor 3
issues.description: At turn seq 218, floor 3 encounter 2, enemy dealt 16 damage when player had 24 HP. This is 67% of player's HP, exceeding the 50% threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 16 damage (67% of player's 24 HP)

issues.suggestedFix: Review enemy damage scaling; consider capping single-hit damage relative to player max HP

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 3
issues.description: average profile was defeated on floor 3 with 75% accuracy. Final encounter against the_archivist (boss), dealt 139 but took 110 damage. Early deaths discourage new players.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing early floor difficulty or adding more healing opportunities

issues.title: Max combo stuck at 3 despite 75% accuracy — likely systemic combo cap bug
issues.description: Max combo across entire run is exactly 3 (176 cards played, 75.0% accuracy). All 9 encounters also capped at maxCombo <= 3. With this accuracy, higher combos should be achievable. This appears to be a systemic bug in the combo counting logic.

evidence.metric: maxCombo = 3 with 75.0% accuracy — systemic cap suspected

reproductionSteps: Achieve consecutive correct answers and observe combo counter
issues.suggestedFix: Investigate combo counter logic — appears to be capped at 3 instead of scaling to 5

issues.title: Difficulty spike: F3E2 took 20 turns (prev floor avg: 6.0)
issues.description: Encounter at floor 3 encounter 2 (the_archivist, boss) took 20 turns to resolve, which is 3.3x the previous floor's average of 6.0 turns. This indicates a sudden difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth out enemy stat scaling between floors to avoid jarring difficulty jumps
